accurate.why: Accurately describes each section's extension; rich correct context on each program.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabrications; program descriptions are accurate.

states_purpose.why: States it temporarily extends FAA programs through May 10, 2024.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Describes the extensions section by section.

exceptions_conditions.why: Extension dates noted; no separate carve-outs emphasized at this altitude.

effective_dates.why: Notes May 10, 2024 (and May 11 for the learning period) expiration dates.

major_provisions_covered.why: Thoroughly covers all titles and sections.

correct_entities.why: FAA, DOT, DHS/DOJ, AATF all correct.

correct_figures.why: Dominant May 10, 2024 date correct; the high-level treatment of the May 11 IRC dates is acceptable for a faithful summary.

judged_via: claude-opus-4-8 via parallel Claude Code subagents (full bill text, web/knowledge-verified)
